title: odontites serotinus var. divergens
intro: Odontites serotinus var. divergens, also known as the Divergent Odontites, is a rare, flowering plant species in the balsam family (Montiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The plant is said to have health benefits, such as treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
